claim: Claude Managed Agents run on Anthropic infrastructure, handling resources and prompt caching to avoid expensive token usage that tools like AutoForge consume locally
actionable: Use Claude Managed Agents for long-running tasks to reduce local resource overhead and leverage Anthropic's built-in optimizations
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: Four core primitives for Managed Agents: agent (model, system prompt, tools, skills), environment (runtime type, packages, network), session (agent instance), and events (messages)
actionable: When setting up a Managed Agent, define all four primitives: specify the model and tools, configure the runtime environment, create a session, and establish event flow
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: The console, CLI, and SDK all hit the same endpoints; choose console for prototyping, CLI for quick testing, SDK for production applications
actionable: Start with the console to prototype agent config, then migrate to SDK for production Next.js/TypeScript apps
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: Agents can be assigned skills (like frontend design) that improve code generation quality when the agent creates applications
actionable: Assign relevant skills to your agent in the console (skills.sh marketplace) to guide better code generation in your domain
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: Scraping and storing agent documentation in a project folder enables agents to reference it directly, improving context and reducing hallucinations
actionable: Download API/framework docs as markdown files and place them in a docs/ folder so agents can reference them with file reading
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: Running agents through Managed Agents API requires Anthropic API key (separate from Claude Code subscription) and API usage billing
actionable: Obtain an API key from platform.claude.com and set ANTHROPIC_API_KEY environment variable; budget for API costs
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours

claim: Managed Agents console shows agent details (tools, skills), sessions (running status), and environments, enabling observability and debugging
actionable: Monitor running agents in the console to observe tool calls, session transcripts, and debug unexpected behavior
source_title: Claude Managed Agents: Deploy AI Agents That Run for Hours
